properties.query:
// Save this as a function named "GetAwardAPILogs"
.create function GetAwardAPILogs(hoursAgo:int) {
    ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(hoursAgo * 1h)
    | where ContainerAppName_s in ("award-api-eastus", "award-api-westus")
    | extend LogData = parse_json(Log_s)
    | where isnotempty(LogData.level)
    | extend 
        PacificTime = datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, 'US/Pacific'),
        LogLevel = tostring(LogData.level),
        Logger = tostring(LogData.logger),
        Message = tostring(LogData.message),
        NominationId = toint(LogData.nomination_id),
        UserId = toint(LogData.user_id)
    | project PacificTime, LogLevel, Logger, Message, NominationId, UserId, Region = ContainerAppName_s
}

create-or-alter function GetAwardNominationLogs(ModuleParam:string, LogLevelParam:string, HoursAgo:int) {
    ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(HoursAgo * 1h)
    | where ContainerAppName_s in ("award-api-eastus", "award-api-westus")
    | extend LogData = parse_json(Log_s)
    | extend 
        PacificTime = datetime_utc_to_local(TimeGenerated, 'US/Pacific'),
        Message = tostring(LogData.message),
        Module = tostring(LogData.logger),
        LogLevel = tostring(LogData.level),
        Exception = tostring(LogData.exception),
        NominationId = toint(LogData.nomination_id),
        UserId = toint(LogData.user_id)
    | where Module == ModuleParam and LogLevel == LogLevelParam
    | project PacificTime, LogLevel, Message, Module, Exception, NominationId, UserId, Region = ContainerAppName_s
    | order by PacificTime desc
}
